channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fernando Valenzuela, Mexican-born pitcher whose feats for Dodgers fueled 'Fernandomania,' dies at 63
item.description: Fernando Valenzuela, the Los Angeles Dodgers pitching ace who inspired “Fernandomania” in the early 1980s, has died.
item.dc:creator: Beth Harris, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Transgender golfer Hailey Davidson starts next Q school stage despite 275 female golfers opposing LPGA policy
item.description: Transgender golfer Hailey Davidson teed off for the second stage of qualifying for an LPGA Tour card despite a group of 275 female golfers signing a letter opposing gender policy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: MLB wants Rays to play home games in Tampa Bay area even if Tropicana Field isn't repaired in time
item.description: MLB Commissioner Rob Manfred says the league hopes the Tampa Bay Rays can play their home games in the area after Tropicana Field was decimated by Hurricane Milton
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 76ers rule Embiid and George out for opener with injuries. Bucks' Middleton also expected to be out
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Paul George's debut with the Philadelphia 76ers is on hold and Joel Embiid is again set to miss time with an injury.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pulisic scores direct from corner kick for AC Milan. Then admits it was an accident
item.description: MILAN (AP) — Christian Pulisic scored direct from a corner kick to set AC Milan on the way to its first victory in this season's Champions League. But the United States international admitted it was an accident.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stanley Cup champion Panthers and coach Paul Maurice agree on contract extension
item.description: The Florida Panthers have given out another big contract extension — this one, to their Stanley Cup-winning coach.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Yankees-Dodgers iconic moments: Jackie Robinson steals home in World Series
item.description: One of the most iconic moments in World Series history came in 1955, when Jackie Robinson stole home off Whitey Ford and beat the tag from Yogi Berra to score.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA things to know: As season begins, Celtics chasing Spurs for all-time best record
item.description: The Boston Celtics begin this season as the NBA champions. And sometime this season, the Celtics might take over the top spot on another league list. In the NBA’s all-time won-lost standings, among active franchises, the San Antonio Spurs enter this season with the best record.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU staying humble and hungry during winning streak
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a drive that will go down in school history. The 4th-and-8 conversion to Chase Roberts. The Jake Retzlaff 27-yard scramble. And then the 35-yard strike to Darius Lassiter with 10 seconds left to beat Oklahoma State, 38-35.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 49ers WR Brandon Aiyuk to miss season with knee injury
item.description: (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers wide receiver Brandon Aiyuk will miss the remainder of the 2024 season after suffering a knee injury in the 49ers' loss to the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday. Head coach Kyle Shanahan reported that he tore the MCL and ACL in his right knee.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Dodgers stay alive all the way to the World Series with bullpen games and contributions from all
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The World Series is always the goal for the big-spending Los Angeles Dodgers. It's been elusive recently, with first-round flops two years running. Now, with Shohei Ohtani leading the way for the first time, they are going for another championship.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ticker-tape parade after NY Liberty win: Everything you need to know
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) – After a massive win for the New York Liberty Sunday night, the city is ready to celebrate. On Thursday, New York City will host a ticker-tape parade for the team's first-ever WNBA championship title, Mayor Eric Adams announced. The parade will kick off at 10 a.m.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: National League Champions: Dodgers advance to the World Series with 10-5 win over Mets
item.description: Tommy Edman and Will Smith homered to send Shohei Ohtani into the World Series for the first time, and the Los Angeles Dodgers eliminated the New York Mets with a 10-5 victory in Game 6 of the NL Championship Series on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs stay undefeated, beat 49ers 28-18 in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The formula might look a bit different with the defense and running game carrying the Kansas City Chiefs. But the results are awfully familiar as the two-time defending champions keep knocking off teams — especially the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Moody agrees to 3-year, $39M extension with Warriors: report
item.description: (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors and guard Moses Moody have agreed to a multi-year contract extension, ESPN's Shams Charania posted Sunday evening on X. The extension is reportedly for three years and $39 million, which is an average annual value of about $13 million.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Ricky Pearsall gives 49ers a lift with his return. But they lose Brandon Aiyuk to a knee injury
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers got a lift from rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall making his NFL debut exactly 50 days after being shot in the chest but might have lost starting receiver Brandon Aiyuk to a significant knee injury.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Utah HC defeats Boston in overtime, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is showing a penchant for overtime in its first NHL season. Michael Kesserling scored at 2:46 of overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 2-1 victory over the Boston Bruins on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU gives up 21 points in fourth quarter, lose to New Mexico
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State's losing streak hit six games, and this one was the most hearbreaking. Devon Dampier and Eli Sanders had touchdown runs in the final 3:53 to rally New Mexico to a 50-45 victory over Utah State on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake legend reflects on his journey, leadership, and life beyond the pitch
item.description: Real Salt Lake legend and current Vancouver Whitecaps FC standout Damir Kreilach joins Royal Riot co-host Mattey Casey for an exclusive interview, just ahead of his much-anticipated return to America First Field.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: BYU wins last second thriller over Oklahoma State, 38-35
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The dream season for BYU continues. Jake Retzlaff threw a 35-yard touchdown pass to Darius Lassiter with 10 seconds left and No. 13 BYU remained undefeated, outlasting Oklahoma State 38-35 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: University of South Florida to support hurricane relief efforts during UAB football game
item.description: Fans who donate three or more shelf-stable items will receive a coupon for two complimentary tickets to a 2024 home football game of their choice.
item.dc:creator: Merissa Lynn, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: These Dick's Sporting Goods stores will sell championship gear after closing hours if the Dodgers win on Friday
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers can punch their tickets to the World Series on Friday night, and Southern California fans itching to get their hands on some championship merchandise can do so quickly.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler arrested for DUI, gun charge
item.description: FRANKLIN, Tenn. — Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler was arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated. Officers responded to the 200 block of Bridge Street at around 5 p.m. in Franklin, Tennessee on the report of a minor traffic collision involving two vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, ABC 4

item.title: Kucherov scores with 55 seconds left for 4-3 win over Vegas
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored the winning goal with less than a minute to play just 1:27 after Brandon Hagel had tied it and the Tampa Bay Lightning rallied to beat the Vegas Golden Knights 4-3 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Wave FC gets new ownership after historic sale finalized
item.description: Seven months after it was first reported San Diego Wave FC would be getting new ownership, the National Women's Soccer League club announced on Thursday it was officially sold.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
